scenes.title: Harbor bargain
scenes.biggestGap: Low revision risk; harbor texture and relay-ending already carry the scene.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Seastone Harbor switchback, quay, and eastern signal cairn.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Harbor mud, stripped saddles, wet dock boards, and the dead sending-stone.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina reads cost through cold water-air, purse weight, and the stone under her coat.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's price talk stays pinned to horses, tide, purse, and deck limits.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Gangplank, cast-off work, and the vanishing cliff path keep departure physical.

scenes.title: Departure into silence
scenes.biggestGap: Low revision risk; the coast-falling-away sequence is already well anchored.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Harbor mouth, breakwater, and the ship's first roll beyond shore shelter.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Wet rope, snapping canvas, spray on rail, stone in her palm.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina feels the north line clear only after land-noise and ward-noise fall away.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's helm call and Jaina's answer ride on visible ship handling.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Cliff line shrinking to nothing keeps the severance world-bound.

dialogueRuns.label: Helm exchange after the pull clears

scenes.title: The crossing under opposition
scenes.biggestGap: Crossing beats occasionally slip into abstract magical shorthand and summary language instead of staying in deck labor, hull motion, and bodily strain.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Working deck, stern, lee rail, and below-deck shelf space aboard the *Wolfheart*.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rope burn, iced rail, soaked wool, lantern swing, ladder rung, and the staff under her hands.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina translates supernatural pressure through tooth-ache, eye-pressure, lagging spells, bread-taste, and loss of clean release.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Dagny's arithmetic and Sylvanas's commands must stay pinned to sails, footing, food, water, and whether Jaina can still stand.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Recovered distance should still feel bought by rope, cold, blood, and watch-by-watch labor.

scenes.title: Approach and landfall
scenes.biggestGap: The final third occasionally drifts into polished abstraction right before ice, harbor traces, and Arthas's lead need to do the work.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Ice-clogged approach channel, basalt-cliff bay, new dockwork, and the burned fleet at the far end.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Rigging frost, pole-rings on ice, cracked lips, dock timber, char, and frozen mud under boots.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Jaina experiences arrival as altered sensitivity: the pull splitting by shore path and bay mouth while her body stays sea-sore and overdrawn.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Sylvanas and Dagny lines stay attached to shrouds, soundings, shore read, and landing prep.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Dock bump, shaking hands, and the inland drag keep arrival from turning into summary.
